machine.name: Community Services Law Enforcement And Public Safety Body Camera Evidence Workflow
machine.description: Community-services machine for body camera evidence workflow in the law enforcement and public safety workstream. It monitors incident priority, retention deadline, redaction load, and prosecutor request and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

metadata.domain: Community Services - Law Enforcement And Public Safety
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: incident priority, retention deadline, redaction load, and prosecutor request
metadata.upstreamMachine: Community Services Law Enforcement And Public Safety Traffic Safety Enforcement
downstreamMachines: Community Services Law Enforcement And Public Safety Public Event Safety Planner
agentActions: Dispatch community_intake_agent for urgent community-services intervention on body camera evidence workflow.
Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for body camera evidence workflow.
Create field work order or mobile team task for body camera evidence workflow.
Maintain monitored service path for body camera evidence workflow.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [1144:1148] feeds Community Services Law Enforcement And Public Safety Public Event Safety Planner.

sequences.name: Body Camera Evidence Workflow: WATCH -> URGENT_RESPONSE

metadata.description: Escalates resident or field risk into urgent response.

metadata.action: Dispatch community_intake_agent for urgent community-services intervention on body camera evidence workflow.

sequences.name: Body Camera Evidence Workflow: COORDINATION_NEEDED -> COORDINATE_SERVICES

metadata.action: Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for body camera evidence workflow.

sequences.name: Body Camera Evidence Workflow: FIELD_TASK_NEEDED -> FIELD_WORK_ORDER

metadata.description: Creates a field crew, outreach, or mobile response task.

metadata.action: Create field work order or mobile team task for body camera evidence workflow.

sequences.name: Body Camera Evidence Workflow: STABLE_PATH -> STABLE_SERVICE_PATH

metadata.description: Confirms resident service path is stable and monitored.

metadata.action: Maintain monitored service path for body camera evidence workflow.

inputSequences.name: Urgent response sequence
inputSequences.description: Two-step community risk escalation ending in urgent response.

inputSequences.name: Coordinate services
inputSequences.description: Coordinates health, public safety, housing, transit, or city service partners.

inputSequences.name: Field work order
inputSequences.description: Creates a field response or outreach task.

inputSequences.name: Stable service path
inputSequences.description: Confirms the resident or city service path is stable.

inputSequences.name: Baseline without output
inputSequences.description: Initial observation arms the urgent path without firing.
